sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36681" key="e)camau/rwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξᾰμαύρ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n36681.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disappearing,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μετάλλων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.434a</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
